summary_text: **Findings (Residual Risk)** 1. **Manual command hints are still mixed-path**: Codex hints correctly route to lane bridge, but Gemini/GLM hints still point to direct delegates, so manual copy/paste can bypass bridge-level guardrails/failover conventions. [detect-delegator-task.sh](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/detect-delegator-task.sh#L68), [detect-delegator-task.sh](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/detect-delegator-task.sh#L95), [detect-delegator-task.sh](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/detect-delegator-task.sh#L133) 2. **ACPX stale `run_id` protection is implemented and tested**: guard exists in reader and ACPX regression test exists/passes. [delegation-context.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/delegation-context.js#L124), [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L300), [test-phase0-handoff.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-phase0-handoff.mjs#L174) **Smallest safe changes to close residuals (no new runtime behavior)** 1. **Manual hints**: keep existing `command:` lines unchanged, add a second advisory line (e.g. `bridge_command:`) for Gemini/GLM that shows canonical lane-bridge invocation. This avoids breaking any parser that expects current `command:` while making safe path explicit. 2. **Tests for hints**: extend detect tests table-driven for all trigger branches and assert: - Codex `command:` remains bridge-based. - Gemini/GLM include new `bridge_command:` (if added). - Existing `command:` compatibility remains. Current baseline test only checks one codex and one glm case: [test-detect-delegator-task.mjs](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-detect-delegator-task.mjs#L18) 3. **ACPX stale coverage hardening (test-only)**: add a direct unit test for `readDelegationContext()` mismatch/match behavior so stale guard remains protected even if bridge formatting changes later. Target helper: [delegation-context.js](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/delegation-context.js#L108) I did not edit files. I also ran the focused tests; both `test-detect-delegator-task.mjs` and `test-phase0-handoff.mjs` are green.
